script: echo === 1. service status ===; systemctl is-active mskai-bot.service mskai-responder.service; echo; echo === 2. activities vs outbound mtimes ===; sudo ls -la /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/activities.jsonl /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/outbound.jsonl /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/responder-debug.log /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null; echo; echo === 3. recent responder-errors pattern ===; sudo tail -15 /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null; echo; echo === 4. debug log line count + tail ===; sudo grep -c '^=====' /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/responder-debug.log 2>/dev/null; sudo tail -25 /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/responder-debug.log 2>/dev/null
